goals.title: Bootstrap
goals.objective: Create separate GitHub repo, scaffold Next.js 15 + Tailwind v4 + TypeScript, push and deploy hello-world to Vercel; document setup in README

goals.title: Korean landing
goals.objective: Mobile-first Korean landing page (hero, value prop, 3-step preview of single-player lesson, CTA) — no signup required; verify on mobile viewport

goals.title: Single-player lesson 1
goals.objective: Build first interactive Codex CLI lesson in Korean (key-input simulation, instant feedback, completion screen); track lesson completion locally

goals.title: Lesson library
goals.objective: Add 4 more single-player Codex lessons (/goal, /plan, /verify, real-world workflow) plus library index page in Korean; mobile UX verified

goals.title: Auth + persistence
goals.objective: Wire Supabase Auth (anonymous + magic-link upgrade) and Postgres for lesson progress; migrate local state to server; preserve mobile UX

goals.title: Realtime presence
goals.objective: Show concurrent learners count using Supabase Realtime; '지금 N명 학습 중' on landing and lesson screens

goals.title: Multiplayer co-op
goals.objective: Implement 2-player co-op Codex challenge (room creation, invite link, shared puzzle state, in-room chat); first co-op puzzle shipped

goals.title: Multiplayer race
goals.objective: Public lobby + matchmaking + race mode (fastest correct Codex prompt wins); 1 race puzzle + result screen with share button

goals.title: Leaderboard + retention
goals.objective: Daily challenge, streak counter, share-to-social buttons, weekly leaderboard; analytics wired

goals.title: Reddit launch + feedback iteration
goals.objective: Soft-launch to r/Korea r/programming r/learnprogramming r/OpenAI; collect feedback; ship at least one round of issue fixes and content additions
goals.note: Code-side complete; awaits human action — see LAUNCH.md

goals.title: Concurrency push to 100 CCU
goals.objective: Promote, add content, harden infra, run targeted Reddit/SNS pushes until 100 concurrent users (5-min sustained) is reached and recorded
goals.note: Code-side complete; awaits human action — see LAUNCH.md

claudeObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omc/ultragoal/goals.json: G001-bootstrap Bootstrap; G002-korean-landing Korean landing; G003-single-player-lesson-1 Single-player lesson 1; G004-lesson-library Lesson library; G005-auth-persistence Auth + persistence; G006-realtime-presence Realtime presence; G007-multiplayer-co-op Multiplayer co-op; G008-multiplayer-race Multiplayer race; G009-leaderboard-retention Leaderboard + retention; G010-reddit-launch-feedback-iteration Reddit launch + feedback iteration; G011-concurrency-push-to-100-ccu Concurrency push to 100 CCU
